message:
refactor(mixtral): update forwardBatchTokens to use shared MoE block

Phase 2B: Apply shared MoE block to additional forward functions

Updated forwardBatchTokens:
- Replace inline MoE code (~29 lines) with encodeMoEBlock (~17 lines)
- Uses VIP experts (0, 4) pattern - identical to forwardTrueSingleSubmit
- Removes unused tensor name buffers

Skipped forwardBatchedLayerByLayer:
- Uses fundamentally different "sparse batching" pattern
- Union of all tokens' experts, batched FFN calls
- CPU-side residual add
- Would need encodeMoEBlockBatched variant
